subcodes.title: Words to the first American pilgrims, spoken on 1900-01-09
subcodes.first_line: The field in America is now likened unto a field of land in which are planted small trees
subcodes.subjects: @Mary Magdalene, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
